name: Bulgarian Split Squats
description: Keep torso upright. Front knee tracks over foot, not past toes. Drive through the heel.
progressionPath: Add Pause → Add Weight → Jump Variation

name: Tempo Pushups
description: Elbows at 45 degrees, not flared out. Core tight, body in a straight line from head to heels.
progressionPath: Decline → Archer → One-Arm Negative

name: Doorway / Table Rows
description: Squeeze shoulder blades together at the top. Keep hips from sagging.
progressionPath: Lower Body Angle → Single Arm → Add Weight Vest

name: Pike Pushups
description: Hips high in an inverted V. Lower the top of your head towards the floor, not your face.
progressionPath: Elevate Feet → Wall Handstand Hold → Wall Handstand Pushup

name: Nordic Hamstring Curls
description: Lower your torso as slowly as possible. Keep a straight line from knees to head. Catch yourself with your hands.
progressionPath: Increase Negative Time → Add Band Assistance → Full Nordic

name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
description: Drive through the heel of the planted foot. Squeeze the glute hard for 2 seconds at the top. Keep hips level.
progressionPath: Elevate Shoulders → Add Weight on Hips → Add Pause at Top

name: Plank to Pushup
description: Minimize hip rocking as you move from plank to pushup position and back. Alternate leading arm.
progressionPath: Increase Duration → Add Weight Vest

name: Hollow Body Hold
description: Press lower back firmly into the floor. The lower your legs and arms, the harder it is. No arch in the back.
progressionPath: Tuck → One Leg Extended → Full Hollow → Add Rocking Motion

name: Archer Pushups
description: Wide hand position. As you lower, shift your weight to one side, keeping the other arm straight.
progressionPath: Increase ROM → Elevate Feet → Transition to One-Arm Negative

name: Pistol Squat Negatives
description: Stand on one leg, slowly lower yourself to a seated position on a chair. Use both legs to stand up and repeat.
progressionPath: Lower Chair Height → Assisted Pistol → Full Pistol Squat

name: Single-Leg Calf Raises
description: Stand on the edge of a step. Full range of motion — deep stretch at the bottom, hard squeeze at the top.
progressionPath: Add Weight → Bent Knee Variation (Soleus focus)

name: Jump Squats
description: Squat to parallel, then explode upward. Land softly with knees bent to absorb the impact. Reset fully between reps.
progressionPath: Add Height → Tuck Jump → Broad Jump

name: Wall Sit
description: Back flat against the wall, thighs parallel to the floor, knees at 90 degrees. Hold without sliding.
progressionPath: Increase Duration → Single Leg → Add Weight on Thighs

name: Reverse Lunges
description: Step back and lower until both knees are at 90 degrees. Drive through the front heel to return. Keep torso upright.
progressionPath: Add Pause → Deficit Lunge → Walking Lunges with Rotation

name: Step-Ups
description: Drive through the heel of the elevated foot to stand. Avoid pushing off the trailing leg. Control the descent.
progressionPath: Increase Height → Add Knee Drive at Top → Single Leg Focus

name: Sumo Squat Hold
description: Wide stance, toes out at 45 degrees. Lower into a deep squat and hold. Keep chest up and knees tracking over toes.
progressionPath: Add Pulse Reps → Add Heel Raises → Add Side Reach

name: Good Mornings
description: Hands behind head, slight knee bend. Hinge at the hips, lowering torso until nearly parallel to the floor. Squeeze glutes to return.
progressionPath: Add Pause at Bottom → Single Leg → Add Resistance Band

name: Diamond Pushups
description: Hands form a diamond shape below your chest. Elbows track back, not out. Full range of motion.
progressionPath: Increase Reps → Deficit Diamond Pushup → Weighted

name: Decline Pushups
description: Feet elevated on a chair, hands on the floor. The higher the feet, the more upper chest and shoulders are targeted.
progressionPath: Increase Elevation → Add Pause → Handstand Pushup Progression

name: Tricep Dips
description: Hands on the edge of a chair, fingers forward. Lower until elbows reach 90 degrees. Keep back close to the chair.
progressionPath: Straighten Legs → Elevate Feet → Weighted

name: Wide Pushups
description: Hands wider than shoulder width. Focus on squeezing the chest at the top. Elbows track at 45 degrees.
progressionPath: Add Pause at Bottom → Archer Variation → Weighted Vest

name: Wall Handstand Hold
description: Kick up to a wall handstand. Stack hands, wrists, elbows, and shoulders. Engage core and keep body tight.
progressionPath: Increase Duration → Chest-to-Wall → Free Handstand

name: Explosive Pushups
description: Push up fast enough for hands to leave the floor. Land with soft, bent elbows. Full reset between reps.
progressionPath: Clap Pushup → Behind-Back Clap → Superman Pushup

name: Towel Rows
description: Loop a towel around a door handle. Lean back, arms straight, then row yourself up. Squeeze shoulder blades at the top.
progressionPath: Lower Body Angle → Single Arm → Add Resistance Band

name: Towel Face Pulls
description: Loop towel around door handle at face height. Pull ends toward your face, elbows high and wide. Squeeze rear delts at peak.
progressionPath: Increase Reps → Add 2-Second Hold → Single Arm

name: Dead Bug
description: Lying on back, arms up, knees at 90 degrees. Lower opposite arm and leg toward the floor while pressing lower back down. Count each pair as one rep.
progressionPath: Add Pause → Extend Leg Fully → Add Resistance Band

name: Bicycle Crunches
description: Alternate bringing opposite elbow to knee. Focus on rotating the torso, not just moving elbows. Keep lower back pressed to the floor.
progressionPath: Increase Reps → Add Slow Tempo → Full Extension Version

name: V-Ups
description: Lying flat, raise both legs and arms to meet in the middle simultaneously. Keep legs straight. Lower with control.
progressionPath: Tuck V-Up → Full V-Up → Add Ankle Weight

name: L-Sit Hold
description: Support body on two chairs, lift both legs straight out in front parallel to the floor. Keep arms locked out.
progressionPath: Tuck L-Sit → Single Leg → Full L-Sit → Increase Duration

name: Superman Hold
description: Lie face down, extend arms forward. Lift chest, arms, and legs off the floor simultaneously. Squeeze glutes at the top.
progressionPath: Increase Duration → Alternating Arms/Legs → Add Resistance Band

name: Mountain Climbers
description: In pushup position, drive alternate knees toward chest in a running motion. Keep hips down and core tight.
progressionPath: Increase Speed → Cross-Body Variation → Add Pushup Between Sets

name: Russian Twists
description: Seated, lean back to 45 degrees, feet elevated. Rotate the torso fully side to side. One touch per side counts as one rep.
progressionPath: Increase Reps → Add Weight → Slow the Tempo

name: Inchworm
description: From standing, hinge at hips and walk hands out to a plank position. Optionally add a pushup. Walk hands back to feet and stand.
progressionPath: Add Pushup → Add Pike Pushup → Add Jump at Top

name: Burpees
description: Drop to a plank, perform a pushup, jump feet to hands, then jump explosively with arms overhead. Keep a strong plank position.
progressionPath: Add Pushup → Jump Higher → Burpee to Tuck Jump

name: Bear Crawl
description: On hands and toes, knees hovering 1 inch off the floor. Move opposite hand and foot together. Keep back flat, hips level.
progressionPath: Add Resistance Band → Bear Crawl with Rotation → Weighted Vest

name: Turkish Get-Up
description: Lie on your back with one arm extended toward the ceiling. Rise to standing through a controlled sequence. 2 reps each side.
progressionPath: Master Bodyweight → Add Light Weight → Increase Load

name: Squat to Overhead Reach
description: Deep squat with elbows inside knees. As you rise, extend arms fully overhead and lean back slightly. Flow between positions with control.
progressionPath: Add Rotation at Top → Add Jump → Add Overhead Weight
